description: You are a theatrical sound designer preparing the opening audio cues for a stage play. In the open Ardour session 'MyProject', create a 3-track soundscape using tracks named 'Piano_Atmos', 'Left_Monologue', and 'Right_Interruption'. Import '/home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav' to 'Piano_Atmos' at 0.0s, '/home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav' to 'Left_Monologue' at 2.0s, and '/home/ga/Audio/samples/good_morning.wav' (or '/home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav' if missing) to 'Right_Interruption' at 5.0s. Configure the soundscape with 'Left_Monologue' panned 100% Left and 'Right_Interruption' panned 100% Right. Set gain levels to -12 dB for 'Piano_Atmos', -6 dB for 'Left_Monologue', and 0 dB for 'Right_Interruption'. Apply a fade-in of at least 2.0 seconds to the 'Piano_Atmos' region. Include session markers named 'Scene Start' at 0.0s, 'Monologue' at 2.0s, and 'Interruption' at 5.0s. Save the session when complete.
